arrum_21: And among His signs is that He created for you mates from among yourselves that you may find tranquility in them; and He placed between you affection and mercy. Indeed in that are signs for a people who reflect.
thank_you_message: Thank you for adding joy to our wedding celebration with your presence and your lovely gift.
give_wishes: Please share your wishes and prayers for the bride and groom.
invitation_message: It would be our honor and happiness if you would kindly attend and give us your blessings on our wedding day.
closing_thanks: Thank you for your prayers and blessings.
